anchor.name: Santal 33
anchor.description: A smoky sandalwood and leather scent softened by iris and violet — iconic, instantly recognizable, and almost universally wearable.

dupes.name: Crystal 33
dupes.similarity_notes: The most direct note-for-note copy. Nails the iris-leather-sandalwood core. Slightly softer dry-down — the amber is replaced by musk, making it cleaner and less smoky. Lasts 6-8 hours vs Santal 33's 10+.

dupes.name: Woody Sandalwood
dupes.similarity_notes: The sandalwood-leather-amber base is a near-perfect reconstruction. The iris is slightly sweeter and the papyrus less smoky. Quieter projection — a plus for office wear, a minus if you want Santal 33's full presence.

dupes.name: Sandalwood
dupes.similarity_notes: More polished and wearable — cleaner sandalwood, better longevity, less synthetic. What you lose is the papyrus smokiness that makes Santal 33 so distinctive. A better everyday sandalwood, not a cheaper one.

dupes.name: Raghba
dupes.similarity_notes: Not a structural dupe — it's a spiritual cousin. Keeps the cardamom and sandalwood warmth but goes full amber-gourmand: sweeter, louder, more wearable. The smoke and iris are gone. An incredible $0.22/ml entry point if you love warmth but can skip the smokiness.
